EmrDb.PatientQuery: SELECT TOP 1 patient_no AS PatientId, patient_name AS PatientName, birth_date AS BirthDate, sex AS Sex, age AS Age FROM dbo.vw_patient_basic WHERE patient_no = @PatientId
EmrDb.LatestChartQuery: SELECT TOP 1 visit_date AS VisitDate, doctor_name AS DoctorName, chief_complaint AS ChiefComplaint, assessment AS Assessment, [plan] AS [Plan], chart_text AS RawText FROM dbo.vw_latest_chart WHERE patient_no = @PatientId ORDER BY visit_date DESC
